languages.text: "Довольно, предок! Твоя враждебность перешла черту. Объяснись!"
"Enough, Seberian! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"
languages.original_text: "Довольно, предок! Твоя враждебность перешла черту. Объяснись!"

traits.locale_text: "Enough, ancestor! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"
"Enough, ancestor! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"
"Enough, ancestor! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"
"Enough, Seberian! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"

languages.text: «¡Ya basta, Seberian! Su hostilidad está fuera de lugar. ¡Explíquese ahora mismo!».
languages.original_text: "Enough, Seberian! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Ya basta, Seberian! Su hostilidad está fuera de lugar. ¡Explíquese ahora mismo!».

languages.text: “够了，塞贝里安！你的敌意太过分了。你最好给我解释清楚！”
languages.original_text: "Enough, Seberian! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"

traits.locale_text: “够了，塞贝里安！你的敌意太过分了。你最好给我解释清楚！”

languages.text: « Assez, Seberian ! Votre animosité dépasse les bornes de l'acceptable. Expliquez-vous, à la fin ! »
languages.original_text: "Enough, Seberian! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"

traits.locale_text: « Assez, Seberian ! Votre animosité dépasse les bornes de l'acceptable. Expliquez-vous, à la fin ! »

languages.text: "Yeter Seberian! Düşmanlığın haddini aştı. Kendini açıkla!"
languages.original_text: "Enough, Seberian! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"

traits.locale_text: "Yeter Seberian! Düşmanlığın haddini aştı. Kendini açıkla!"

languages.text: 「もう十分だ、シベリア！君の敵意は行き過ぎている。説明しろ！」
languages.original_text: "Enough, Seberian! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"

traits.locale_text: 「もう十分だ、シベリア！君の敵意は行き過ぎている。説明しろ！」

languages.text: "Schluss, Ahnherr! Eure Feindseligkeit geht zu weit. Erklärt Euch!"
languages.original_text: "Enough, ancestor! Your hostility has overstepped the mark. Explain yourself!"

traits.locale_text: "Schluss, Ahnherr! Eure Feindseligkeit geht zu weit. Erklärt Euch!"
